'''vamuzhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mycalesine|mycalesine]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-m-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mycalesine|mycalesine]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| vamuzhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:væmizhith|væmizhith]] || [[word:væmizhij|væmizhij]] || [[word:væmizhish|væmizhish]] || [[word:væmizhi|væmizhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:vamumuzhuth|vamumuzhuth]] || [[word:vamumuzhuj|vamumuzhuj]] || [[word:vamumuzhush|vamumuzhush]] || [[word:vamumuzhu|vamumuzhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:vamuzhuth|vamuzhuth]] || [[word:vamuzhuj|vamuzhuj]] || [[word:vamuzhush|vamuzhush]] || [[word:vamuzhu|vamuzhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:vamufzhuth|vamufzhuth]] || [[word:vamufzhuj|vamufzhuj]] || [[word:vamufzhush|vamufzhush]] || [[word:vamufzhuf|vamufzhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vamuzhuthu|vamuzhuthu]] || [[word:vamuzhuju|vamuzhuju]] || [[word:vamuzhushu|vamuzhushu]] || [[word:vamuzhuku|vamuzhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vamuzhuth|vamuzhuth]] || [[word:vamuzhuj|vamuzhuj]] || [[word:vamuzhush|vamuzhush]] || [[word:vamuzhu|vamuzhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vamuzhuthul|vamuzhuthul]] || [[word:vamuzhujul|vamuzhujul]] || [[word:vamuzhushul|vamuzhushul]] || [[word:vamuzhukul|vamuzhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vamuzhuthuthu|vamuzhuthuthu]] || [[word:vamuzhujuju|vamuzhujuju]] || [[word:vamuzhushushu|vamuzhushushu]] || [[word:vamuzhuku|vamuzhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vamuzhuthun|vamuzhuthun]] || [[word:vamuzhujun|vamuzhujun]] || [[word:vamuzhushun|vamuzhushun]] || [[word:vamuzhukun|vamuzhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vamuzhuthuoro|vamuzhuthuoro]] || [[word:vamuzhujuoro|vamuzhujuoro]] || [[word:vamuzhushuoro|vamuzhushuoro]] || [[word:vamuzhukuoro|vamuzhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
